# BP-136 positive: schema migration runs in a net/http request handler.
lang: go
file: BP-136-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-net-http
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func createUser(db *gorm.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = db.AutoMigrate(&User{})
}
